textByHash.081eb0f753f9637f545e239751e46a42550ff777: Ah well, you're trustworthy I suppose. What can I help you with?
textByHash.08900483a5bb241109cfae74a373f47dccea6053: The council declared her unfit for rule not long after the king died. She disappeared soon after and no one knows what became of her. Now the council are the permanent rulers of Kourend.
textByHash.0aa7c808e14362e9936ff30e8d2fcb46a8fda77a: Hello. Have you spoken to Lord Arceuus yet?
textByHash.0c592bd3037a7babe429d45a6a1cf70953b6e2e1: Hello again. Thank you for everything you did for Thana. You are a good friend to the people of Arceuus.
textByHash.0f845e6e85f10b4c10ba55cd2f6684ddcc2d161b: It does sound odd, but back then they were known as the Disciples of Chaos. They were just a small Zamorakian cult of little note.
textByHash.114b25e0e204059209380d9f9e54089648e4153c: He'll be in the Tower of Magic, north west of here.
textByHash.12103cff38370039a06c317fc702f338b56b938f: I... Thank you for the offer. You can't help though. She's gone.
textByHash.229fa4d899ed5b8f16239e0c78204f091d755732: But something's gone wrong... Thana is dead and I don't know why!
textByHash.2487b17acda13cf23ceb12d3514efa4b74e3a831: The council are supposed to rule Kourend, but they never do anything for the people. They shouldn't even exist anyway. They were only meant to rule until the last king's daughter came of age.
textByHash.25320903773b358e30be91b15c4a46579fa519af: Good. Hopefully Kourend will have no more issues with the Disciples of Yama.
textByHash.361cabd5c1510ad70cdbbe68f8c5e688735b950a: He's a bit of a mystery. He's a demon of some sorts, but he doesn't seem to have any actual presence in Kourend yet. In fact, until recently, he had no connection to the cult.
textByHash.5418551dcef95b7e14608c01d4be2691dd67041a: I'm Mori... I was going to the Library with my friend, Thana. Suddenly, I felt a strange power all through me and then... she... she...
textByHash.576454c02da700f95010ea1bf12c82f5d188dd92: After what happened with Thana, I volunteered to help out with the Dark Altar investigations. The device used there was redirecting power from the Altar, but a similar device could block a magical connection entirely.
textByHash.57c990df2a4cf93d79978f343685eeb7e0849050: Please don't take too long. You'll find Lord Arceuus in the Tower of Magic.
textByHash.63d7f07d67ea6d1da8c872d781de1d3e4d027a85: Through another demon called the Voice of Yama.
textByHash.6c84bc65dde75cbad2333a645e9f00aed37d168c: I come here quite often now. This is a nice quiet place for me to think and reflect. It's my way of remembering Thana.
textByHash.73db7895493b0cb29b9ebd4b69a99bc2b666667d: It was a waste of time even going to them. They were never going to care about Thana.
textByHash.7c3b373953f15c4e3bd8a62cf5908bc4d71529e5: Right. You'll need to hide this somewhere in the Chasm of Fire. Here you go.
textByHash.84414ed8e4007e3f111d0b233eae003b95fbfeec: The people of Arceuus don't get ill. We're immortal. We have been for a thousand years, ever since the Ascent of Arceuus. This shouldn't happen... This can't happen...
textByHash.8629563bc7a9a3af0343fce5fd0d53a58e5b7684: For a time, though I imagine the Voice of Yama would be quickly replaced. However, if you wanted to remove that connection, I do have another idea...
textByHash.90f7052065e8f1c8040a29a9515d05cd1f572560: The events of that day became known as the Ascent of Arceuus.
textByHash.94b78c249c6c4319bcea77497abe69a80598076d: I have enough supplies for another. Here, you'll need to hide it somewhere in the Chasm of Fire.
textByHash.a4d210cbd1424551a2a7c2f4465959114598e3d1: Hello. Have you spoken to Councillor Andrews yet?
textByHash.ab4a8115a4a199a5dd41ecfde526723837791888: You... You're right. We should let the Kourend Council know. Could you help? I don't want to leave her.
textByHash.b2ca20f9e4c579b044b04fd7a429cd244dc04632: You can mine dense essence blocks from the mine north east of here. They can be turned into dark essence blocks using the Dark Altar.
textByHash.bbef2b43ece96be9ae6c80f4fab03e20ae1c8ae3: Well... Yes, I have, but that research was meant to be a secret...
textByHash.bf43ee1792fd720bce62fe9d837afb27b0320729: I should be able to make you one. I'll need some molten glass and a dark essence block.
textByHash.c0dd009f348676fc73d346eee2d131aebf5a1ba9: Yes... A long time ago, our leader, Trobin Arceuus, used the Dark Altar to discover the secret of immortality. He came to us and let us share in this secret.
textByHash.c812c2a06add445b487420bd58a574568d1a632d: Thank you... Could you head to Kourend Castle and let Councillor Andrews know what's happened? He's in charge of the council.
textByHash.db696ea64e149b83ab1567fdbfe8a2e8284e58dc: That's right. We never tried it before because the Dark Altar issues were more pressing, but I don't see why it wouldn't work.
textByHash.dcc65426a46dd01db4c67a66d1f86ea8288997d8: You just need to hide it somewhere in the Chasm of Fire.
textByHash.e44ce8f44121029a7e230b3355be2c88a5f46267: Oh... I shouldn't be surprised I guess... The council only care about helping themselves.
textByHash.e58dbb19f5292bf952b9de5c71b3c40614247939: Please hurry. You'll find him in Kourend Castle.
textByHash.e67f5895d783c0c492ba93b79aa4ed32dc6804e8: Hello again. Do you have some molten glass and a dark essence block yet?
textByHash.e7c2cac53ba4c1d9224fce1b63d9ee02a078d5c7: Of course. What do you need?
textByHash.ed942590be3bdb66fdad87ad085a3f09e7ec4810: Well... if the Council won't help us, maybe Lord Arceuus will. He doesn't show his face in public much these days but he can't ignore the death of one of his own.
textByHash.f6479b838d420bc809462aefafb17acea5073b7c: Hello there. Did you manage to get that device hidden?
textByHash.f9819e1d8d201651bc413be0f61c8841250fa61a: Hello there. Thank you for helping us, you are a good friend to the people of Arceuus.
